steps.title: Find the median of each data set
steps.content:
• Data set A has 9 dots; the middle (5th) dot is at 7.
  • Data set B also has 9 dots; its middle dot is at 7.

steps.title: Compare the spreads to assess standard deviation
steps.content:
• Data set A: smallest value 4, largest 10 → range 6.
  • Data set B: smallest value 5, largest 9 → range 4.
  • Since standard deviation increases with spread, A’s SD is larger than B’s.

steps.title: Determine which statements must be true
steps.content:
• Statement I: medians are equal → true.
  • Statement II: standard deviations are equal → false.
  • Therefore only statement I must be true.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
